entries.title: AVL Tree (Self-Balancing Binary Search Tree)

entries.title: Binary Search

entries.title: Comb Sort

entries.title: Fenwick Tree (Binary Indexed Tree, BIT)

entries.title: Fibonacci Numbers (Iterative and Matrix)

entries.title: FNV-1a Hash

entries.title: Breadth-First Search (BFS) on a Graph

entries.title: Queue (FIFO)

entries.title: Red-Black Tree (Self-Balancing Binary Search Tree)

entries.title: Ring Buffer (Circular Buffer, Fixed Capacity)
entries.summary: A ring buffer (circular buffer) is a fixed-capacity FIFO backed by a single array whose head and tail indices wrap around modulo the length, so no element is ever shifted and no memory is reallocated.
